lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It requires major mechanical repairs and is not currently in reliable running condition.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is a solid performer with plenty of life left in it! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a dependable and practical choice for your daily commute. It's ready to work hard for its next owner!

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission perform reliably. There are minor cosmetic blemishes on the exterior. The interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical components are functional.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior body is straight and the paint retains a healthy shine, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections like small stone chips on the hood and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Mechanically, it is solid and reliable, having received regular servicing. The interior is clean and well-preserved, showing only minimal wear on the driver's seat bolster. Overall, it's a dependable and presentable car ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable daily driver. While it is mechanically functional and runs reliably, it shows clear signs of age and regular use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the roof, and a few minor dings on the passenger-side panels. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear, including some thinning of the carpet and a small tear in the driver’s seat upholstery. It has a consistent service history, though the buyer should expect to perform some upcoming maintenance, such as replacing the tires soon. This car is an ideal option for anyone needing a functional, honest vehicle at an accessible price point.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit delivers dependable performance and sophisticated comfort. It has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for quality and roadworthiness. We invite you to experience the superior handling and well-preserved interior of this exceptional motorcar.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my favorite car. It’s been super reliable and is in wonderful shape—honestly, it drives like a dream and has been very well-loved! It’s clean, comfy, and ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to absolutely love how it handles!
Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. This example
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of performance and comfort, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor, superficial character marks typical of a well-loved car. Step inside to find a clean, non-smoker cabin where the upholstery remains firm and free of significant wear. All electronic features, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been strictly serviced according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring a smooth, quiet idle and confident acceleration. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a firm, responsive braking system, this car is ready for immediate enjoyment without the need for upcoming maintenance. It represents a reliable opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent performance. This specimen has been curated to ensure a refined driving experience, balancing aesthetic preservation with rigorous operational standards. A premier choice for the discerning driver who values proven reliability and executive presence.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a premier balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. It represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term value and proven roadworthiness.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a reliable companion. It’s in really solid shape and drives beautifully—perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it's ready to hit the pavement with a new owner today. Come see it for yourself, I think you'll really love how it handles!

Offering a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with double-VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This example has been proactively maintained with the critical rear subframe reinforcement already completed to ensure chassis rigidity. Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry remains tight with recent bushing refreshes, and the valve clearance has been adjusted to factory spec. While the exterior shows minor cosmetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver’s car, the drivetrain and cooling system are in excellent health, making it an ideal candidate for spirited canyon carving or an enthusiast's daily driver.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs reliably.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, though minor road peppering consistent with careful use can be found upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple and free of tears, while all electronic features—including the high-definition infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has benefited from a consistent service schedule, with a documented history of oil changes and a recent multi-point inspection already completed. The engine pulls smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, providing a quiet and composed ride. Equipped with tires showing ample tread and responsive brakes, it offers a confident driving experience. This is a solid, reliable choice for any buyer looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and long-term value. This specimen has been rigorously vetted to ensure mechanical consistency and aesthetic appeal, offering a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. A premier acquisition for those who demand reliability without compromise.

We are pleased to present this well-maintained vehicle, offering a balanced combination of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, confirming its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. A distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and value.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been truly loved? I’m parting with my car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable and drives like a dream. It’s perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. I’d love for it to go to a great new home—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS. This example delivers exceptional mechanical feedback through its Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained for structural integrity with necessary subframe reinforcement already performed. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and a cooling system refresh to ensure thermal efficiency under load. The suspension retains its factory-spec geometry, providing the precise turn-in and lateral stability expected of this platform. This is a mechanically robust specimen ready for spirited engagement, presenting in honest condition for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car in good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well. Clean title.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of pride in ownership, presenting in strong, reliable condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and odor-free; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and every feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust, benefiting from a documented history of consistent maintenance and recent service. It shifts smoothly, brakes confidently, and handles with the precision you would expect from a well-cared-for machine. This is a dependable, stylish choice for a buyer seeking a high-quality driving experience and lasting value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model delivers a refined driving experience that aligns with our rigorous standards for quality and performance. We invite you to experience its superior handling and sophisticated interior firsthand.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle embodies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. It has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring a seamless transition for its next proprietor. Offering a distinguished presence and reliable performance, this motorcar represents an astute acquisition for those seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and drives like a dream! It’s been well-loved and is totally ready to hit the road with its next owner. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great and feels fantastic behind the wheel, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—you won't be disappointed!

Available is a 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a factory limited-slip differential. This example maintains its structural integrity with a verified rear subframe and features a suspension tuned for high lateral G-loading. While exhibiting minor cosmetic wear expected of a driver’s car, the mechanical components are dialed in, offering a flat torque curve and an 8,000 RPM redline experience. Recent service includes valve clearance adjustments and a cooling system refresh.
Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs strong. No issues.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and style. The exterior paint shines beautifully, showing only the slight, expected signs of use from a well-loved car. Inside, you'll find a pristine, non-smoking cabin with comfortable seating and all tech features operating exactly as they should. Under the hood, the car is in great health, benefiting from regular oil changes and proactive maintenance; it handles predictably and delivers a smooth, quiet ride. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is mechanically sound and aesthetically pleasing, representing a solid value for a discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. Rigorously inspected to meet our exacting standards, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value. Acquire a vehicle that reflects your commitment to quality without compromise.
